subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou seest me in the mouth of the serpent, and dost witness how it stingeth me at every moment. Wilt Thou not come to mine aid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی ترانی فی فم الثعبان و تشهد کیف یلدغنی فی کل حین و حان اما تنصرنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
